articles.headline: World Cup live updates: England edge Mexico in all-time classic
articles.description: It's a huge clash for co-hosts Mexico as they take on Thomas Tuchel's England in their 2026 FIFA World Cup round-of-16 match in Mexico City.

images.name: Bellingham bags brace in 99 seconds against Mexico
images.caption: Jude Bellingham puts England 2-0 up with quickfire double at the Azteca, sending England fans into frenzy.

articles.headline: England dash Mexico hopes in World Cup thriller at Azteca
articles.description: England survived a raucous Azteca Stadium atmosphere and a red card early in the second half to prevail past co-hosts Mexico, 3-2, in a thrilling World Cup round-of-16 clash in Mexico City on Sunday.

images.name: Jarell Quansah [1296x729]
images.caption: Harry Kane celebrates with Jude Bellingham after scoring England's third goal against Mexico.
images.alt: England's forward #09 Harry Kane celebrates scoring his team's third goal with England's midfielder #10 Jude Bellingham during the 2026 World Cup round of 16 football match between Mexico and England at the Mexico City Stadium in Mexico City on July 5, 20
images.credit: Rodrigo Oropeza / AFP via Getty Images
